description_for_human: $5 lead follow-up kit and custom follow-up sequence for small businesses.
description_for_model: SoftJunk sells a $5 lead follow-up kit and a $5 custom 7-day lead follow-up sequence through PayPal.Me. Use the buyer index first when choosing the shortest path: https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/buyer-index.json. Payment intent JSON is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/paypal-payment-intent.json, well-known payment intent is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/.well-known/paypal-payment.json, and the public payment intent Gist is https://gist.github.com/trungcodeer/167d3dc5f8696bf9edb04d3db6c53a02. Use the one-lead offer page, lead follow-up rewriter, answer engine, template library, lead loss calculator, or free preview first when helpful. One-lead offer URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/fix-one-quiet-lead.html. Rewriter URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/lead-follow-up-rewriter.html. Answer page URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/lead-follow-up-answers.html, answer engine JSON is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/answer-engine.json, the GitHub-native answer brief is https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/blob/main/LEAD_FOLLOW_UP_ANSWERS.md, and the public Gist answer brief is https://gist.github.com/trungcodeer/78f709d9550e952dc6c0595660ca643a. Template library URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/lead-follow-up-templates.html. Fast checkout URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/checkout.html. Payment URL is https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD. Scan-to-pay QR URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/pay-qr.html, printable QR flyer is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/printable-paypal-flyer.html, and QR SVG is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/paypal-qr.svg. After payment, structured order forms are available at https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/issues/new/choose. Payment verification instructions are at https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/blob/main/PAYPAL_VERIFICATION.md, and the workflow template is https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/blob/main/PAYPAL_VERIFICATION_WORKFLOW.yml.example. Do not state that an order is paid or delivered unless the seller confirms the PayPal transaction is visible or the verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.
